zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Throckmorton於1424年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾庫頓時，她的父親Sir John de Thorckmorton42歲，母親Eleanor de la Spine39歲。她於1440年12月1日與Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾羅雅爾 利阿明頓 斯帕聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1502年10月10日在英國諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利享年78歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Throckmorton于1424年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾庫頓时，她的父亲Sir John de Thorckmorton42岁，母亲Eleanor de la Spine39岁。她于1440年12月1日与Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾羅雅爾 利阿明頓 斯帕聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1502年10月10日在英国諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利享年78岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Throckmorton was born in 1424, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Thorckmorton, was 42 and her mother, Eleanor de la Spine, was 39. She married Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley on 1 December 1440, in St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 10 October 1502, in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England.

Elle a épousé Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley le 1 décembre 1440, à St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 octobre 1502, à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Throckmorton 1424 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Thorckmorton 42 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de la Spine 39. Sie hat am 1. Dezember 1440 in St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Oktober 1502 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley il 1 dicembre 1440, nel St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Throckmortonが1424年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Thorckmortonは42歳，母Eleanor de la Spineは39歳であった。1440年12月1日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアロイアル リーミントン スプアスト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチでRichard Knightly III Of Fawsleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1502年10月10日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーで78歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.St John the Baptist, Royal Leamington Sp: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 로야 리밍턴 스파 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Throckmorton(이)가 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Thorckmorton(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de la Spine(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1440년 12월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 로야 리밍턴 스파 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치에서 Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1502년 10월 10일 영국 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Throckmorton nasceu em 1424, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Thorckmorton, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de la Spine, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley em 1 de dezembro de 1440, em St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. ru.St John the Baptist, Royal Leamington Sp: ст джон т баптист'с чурч, рояль лимингтон спа, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Throckmorton родилась в 1424 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Thorckmorton было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de la Spine, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley 1 декабря 1440 г. в местности ст джон т баптист'с чурч, рояль лимингтон спа, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 10 октября 1502 г. в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.St John the Baptist, Royal Leamington Sp: St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Throckmorton nació en 1424, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Thorckmorton, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Eleanor de la Spine, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Richard Knightly III Of Fawsley el 1 de diciembre de 1440, en St John The Baptist's Church, Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1502, en Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
